title: Evangelion panel at Anime Expo
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion panel at Anime Expo             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Sun Jun 19, 2005 7:30 pm If you're at the Expo, please drop by the grandly-titled Evangelion 10th Anniversary panel on the 4th of July (cue Soundgarden). I believe it's at 11 A.M. in Live Programming 2, which is Room 304, 3rd Floor, of the Anaheim Convention Center. You know the routine--mysterious EVA import gear (including something that, Katsuragi-like, I excavated from the basement of my old house where "it" had been lying since 1997) will be given away, whilst a copy of 2015: The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji gets passed around the audience like a joint. As a native of Southern California, I ordinarily don't recommend Anaheim to visitors, but in this case I would ask that you please make an exception. --C.

[]:             Quote Post by Prons » Sun Jun 19, 2005 7:40 pm This sounds interesting to say the least, I'd go, but sadly I'm afraid I won't be able to make it

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jun 19, 2005 8:07 pm Wrong day. You lose. :cry: Edit: Nevermind.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Jul 06, 2005 2:58 am Blurry sexy. (Hey, it looked okay on the little screen...)

I believe it's at 11 A.M. in Live Programming 2, which is Room 304, 3rd Floor, of the Anaheim Convention Center. As a native of Southern California, I ordinarily don't recommend Anaheim to visitors, but in this case I would ask that you please make an exception. --C.
